mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, event_type, rule_id, conversation_id, message_id, original_content, processed_content, matched_pattern, action_taken, operator, created_at FROM t_security_event WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_security_event WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT id, tenant_id, event_type, rule_id, conversation_id, message_id, original_content, processed_content, matched_pattern, action_taken, operator, created_at FROM t_security_event WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, tenant_id, event_type, rule_id, conversation_id, message_id, original_content, processed_content, matched_pattern, action_taken, operator, created_at FROM t_security_event WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
